characters.description: Betty and Veronica: The Archie to Jones' Betty and Bug's Veronica. Bratty Teenage Daughter: Justifiable in her case growing up in Foster Care made her cynical. Happily Adopted:Inverted. Lux, who, as a Caucasian, American baby, would normally be very desirable for couples looking to adopt, was instead overlooked due to her heart defect.Used, finally, in the season finale, "Love Unexpected", as Cate and Baze's parental rights are reinstated and Lux is adopted as their child. Inverted. Lux, who, as a Caucasian, American baby, would normally be very desirable for couples looking to adopt, was instead overlooked due to her heart defect. Used, finally, in the season finale, "Love Unexpected", as Cate and Baze's parental rights are reinstated and Lux is adopted as their child.

characters.name: Lux Cassidy
characters.description: Betty and Veronica: The Archie to Jones' Betty and Bug's Veronica. Bratty Teenage Daughter: Justifiable in her case growing up in Foster Care made her cynical. Happily Adopted:Inverted. Lux, who, as a Caucasian, American baby, would normally be very desirable for couples looking to adopt, was instead overlooked due to her heart defect.Used, finally, in the season finale, "Love Unexpected", as Cate and Baze's parental rights are reinstated and Lux is adopted as their child. Inverted. Lux, who, as a Caucasian, American baby, would normally be very desirable for couples looking to adopt, was instead overlooked due to her heart defect. Used, finally, in the season finale, "Love Unexpected", as Cate and Baze's parental rights are reinstated and Lux is adopted as their child.

characters.name: Cate Cassidy
characters.description: Alliterative Name:CateCassidy Belligerent Sexual Tension: With Baze. Betty and Veronica: The Archie to Baze's Veronica and Ryan's Betty. Good Girls Avoid Abortion: Cate states in the pilot that she never even considered keeping Lux, but that didn't extend so far as her seeking an abortion. Baze, on the other hand, assumed she'd had one so he's surprised to see Lux. Idiot Ball: Cate's lie to Ryan aboutsleeping with Bazewhich only managed to make thingsworsefor everyone. Thanks a bunch, Catie...For bonus points, she does this just minutes aftershe tells Luxto be honest with her boyfriend.

characters.name: Nathaniel Bazile
characters.description: Belligerent Sexual Tension: With Cate. Betty and Veronica: The Veronica to Ryan's Betty to Cate's Archie. Calling the Old Man Out: Baze does it to his father in "Love Unexpected" Idiot Ball: Baze picks one up when he suddenly decides to interfere with Lux's romantic life. Jerk with a Heart of Gold

characters.name: Ryan Thomas
characters.description: Betty and Veronica: The Betty to Baze's Veronica to Cate's Archie.

characters.name: Matthew Rogers
characters.description: Meaningful Name: It can't be coincidental that Baze's nerdy friend Matthew goes by Math. Though it's also aNon-Indicative Namebecause he teaches English. Only Sane Man: Baze's friend Math is one of the wiser, more sensible people in the show. He tends to have his act together much more frequently than everyone else does.
